request.description:
Returns pet documents data path from veterinary practice

Parameters
request_key Required

A Valid 32 characters alpha-numeric request key

patient_id optional

patient id from practice ( in case of veterinary , this is pet id)

practice_id optional

practice id of office

SortBy
patient_id default

patient id from practice ( in case of veterinary , this is pet id)

practice_id

practice id of office

Returns proceudre categories with procdure codes , if procedure codes are mapped with category in practice

Parameters
request_key Required

A Valid 32 characters alpha-numeric request key

practice_id optional

practice id of office

customer_id optional

Customer Id

procedure_code optional

Procedure code as per practice management system

category optional

procedure category name for getting the list of codes mapped into veterinary dictionary

Sortby
category default

procedure category name for getting the list of codes mapped into veterinary dictionary

practice_id

Practice ID

procedure_code

Procedure code as per practice management system
